zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Stanley於大約1389年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾時，他的父親John de Stanley31歲，母親Isabel de Latham25歲。他和Matilda de Arderne至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1463年5月13日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾艾爾福德享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾艾爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Stanley于大约1389年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾时，他的父亲John de Stanley31岁，母亲Isabel de Latham25岁。他和Matilda de Arderne至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1463年5月13日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾艾爾福德享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾艾爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Stanley was born about 1389, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Stanley, was 31 and his mother, Isabel de Latham, was 25. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Matilda de Arderne. He died on 13 May 1463, in Elford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Elford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Stanley est né environ 1389, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Stanley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Latham, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Matilda de Arderne. Il est décédé le 13 mai 1463, à Elford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Elford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Stanley um 1389 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Stanley 31 und seine Mutter Isabel de Latham 25. Er hatte mit Matilda de Arderne mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Mai 1463 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Elford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Elford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Stanley è nato il circa 1389 nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Stanley, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Latham, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Matilda de Arderne. Morì il 13 maggio 1463, nel Elford, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Elford, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Stanleyが約1389年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Stanleyは31歳，母Isabel de Lathamは25歳であった。彼はMatilda de Arderneとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1463年5月13日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアエルフォードで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアエルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Stanley(이)가 대략 1389년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Stanley(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Latham(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Matilda de Arderne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1463년 5월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 엘퍼드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 엘퍼드에 묻혔다.
